Package org.eventb.keyboard.tests.ui

Class EventBKeyboardExpressionTestCase

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.keyboard.core.tests.AbstractText2EventBMathTestCase
org.eventb.keyboard.tests.core.Text2EventBMathExpressionTestCase
org.eventb.keyboard.tests.ui.EventBKeyboardExpressionTestCase
public class EventBKeyboardExpressionTestCase extends Text2EventBMathExpressionTestCase
This class reuses the test cases provided by Text2EventBMathExpressionTestCase and realize the test in UI.

    • getTranslatorTester

      protected IKeyboardTranslationTester getTranslatorTester()
      Description copied from class: AbstractText2EventBMathTestCase
      Returns a tester for the basic textual translator. Clients shall override this method to test other kinds of translators (e.g. UI translators).
      Overrides:
      getTranslatorTester in class AbstractText2EventBMathTestCase
      Returns:
      a tester for the basic textual translator
